thresholdSource: criticalLow 3.0 / criticalHigh 6.1: tightened from textbook 2.5/6.5 to published hospital panic values (ARUP <3.0 / >6.1; Cheyenne <3.0 / >6.2) for earlier warning on an acutely arrhythmogenic electrolyte (institutional tier, per standing hospital-list decision). plausibleLow 0.5 / plausibleHigh 15: plausibility fences above documented survivor max 14.0 mmol/L (acutecaretesting). Draft — not clinician-approved.
